rulings.Case Title: ROBERT G BAKER VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS RELFECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Campbell Soup Company¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisfied its burden of production and plaintiff failed to produce evidence showing a triable issue as to asbestos content of the insulation debris removed and cleaned by defendant¿s employees. The foundation objections to Mr. Ay¿s declaration are sustained. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: GWENDOLYN RANCHER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS B B-I et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. The motion for withdrawal of attorney of record by plaintiffs¿ lawyers is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless plaintiffs are informed of the tentative ruling by the Cochran firm and the plaintiffs state that they do not contest the tentative ruling. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES AIKINS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant John Crane, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant satisified its burden of production and plaintiff failed to produce evidence showing a triable issue as to asbestos content of the John Crane packing to which plaintiff was exposed. The foundation objections to Mr. Cohen¿s declaration are sustained. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLEY BROWN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Warren Pumps, LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff¿s claims are not barred by the statue of limitations because he did not suffer any disability based on asbestosis since he retired before he was diagnosed with asbestosis. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Recover Unreimbursed Costs And Fees Against Brydon, Hugo Parker And Their Clients
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 5. Berry & Berry¿s motion to recover unreimbursed costs and fees against Brydon, Hugo Parker and their clients is granted as to the clients only. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)
